positive: Minimalist abstract landscape composition featuring soft pastel gradients of sage green, terracotta, and creamy off-white, drawn with clean, thick vector lines. Central focus on a stylized mountain silhouette and a subtle crescent moon. Flat design illustration style, high contrast, balanced composition, perfect for screen printing, seamless repeat background texture, soft diffused lighting, high detail, graphic art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, low resolution, text, watermark, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn details, signature, photorealistic, complex shadows
